ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker facilitating the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "program_id" TEXT /* Reference to the program involved in the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of transactions */,
  "service_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service class */,
  "service_name_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service name */,
  "unique_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" TEXT /* Monetary value of the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the transaction */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the transaction */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "transaction_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_service_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_class_id") REFERENCES service_classes ("service_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_service_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_name_id") REFERENCES service_names ("service_name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "broker_name" TEXT /* Name of the broker */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the broker */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the broker belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the broker */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the broker */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the broker record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the broker record */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brokers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brokers_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the program */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the program record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the program record */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_classes" (
  "service_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service class */,
  "service_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the service class */,
  "service_class_description" TEXT /* Description of the service class */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the service class record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the service class record */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_classes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_classes_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_names" (
  "service_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service name */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_name_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the service name record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the service name record */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_names_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_names_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, auditor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user account */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user account */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the broker facilitating the transaction
Date and time of the transaction
